export class AcceptDoorDashOrderComposer{/**
     * Accept a DoorDash order by ID.
     * Must match server-side: readInt() → orderId
     */constructor(orderId){this._data=void 0;const id=Math.max(1,Math.floor(orderId));this._data=[id];console.log('[📤] AcceptDoorDashOrderComposer packet sent:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){return;}}
